sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] == 32:
        print(f"Large green box: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 100:
        print(f"Charcoal frame id={n['id']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check adjacency between large green box and other objects
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
for pair in adj:
    i, j = pair
    ni, nj = seg['nodes'][i], seg['nodes'][j]
    if (ni['color'] == 'N' and ni['pixels'] == 32) or (nj['color'] == 'N' and nj['pixels'] == 32):
        print(f"Adjacency: id={i} ({ni['color']}, {ni['pixels']}px) <-> id={j} ({nj['color']}, {nj['pixels']}px)")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
